piiPlayground.modeTokenizeDesc: Replace PII with indexed tokens before sending; restore the original details in the response.
piiPlayground.modeMaskDesc: Replace PII with generic placeholders. One-way — the original details are not recoverable.
piiPlayground.modeBlockDesc: Reject the message outright when PII is detected. The user sees a block notice instead of a reply.
piiPlayground.inputHint: Type or paste any sentence — PII will be detected live.
piiPlayground.detectedHint: Hover each highlight to see what type of data the detector identified.
piiPlayground.tokenizedHint: PII replaced with indexed tokens. This is the only version the upstream model sees.
piiPlayground.maskedHint: PII replaced with generic placeholders. This is what gets sent and stored.
piiPlayground.aiHint: Editable — try moving tokens around to test the round-trip.
piiPlayground.restoredHint: Tokens swapped back to your original details. Green spans show what was restored.
piiPlayground.blockHint: PII detected — the message would be rejected and never reach the AI.
piiPlayground.blockBody: Your input contains data that the policy does not allow. Remove the highlighted items and try again.
piiPlayground.blockPassBody: The text would be sent through unchanged.
piiPlayground.noPii: No PII detected — the text would be sent through unchanged.
